profiles.name: Ananya Sharma
profiles.bio: Computer Science student who prefers clean and quiet spaces. Usually studies in the evening and enjoys weekend cafe hopping.
profiles.lookingFor: Female roommate preferred, quiet environment, tidy shared kitchen, okay with occasional friends visiting.

profiles.name: Rohan Mehta
profiles.bio: Marketing intern in Andheri who likes a social but respectful flat vibe. Loves football, music, and cooking simple meals.
profiles.lookingFor: Chill flatmates who communicate clearly, keep common areas usable, and split chores fairly.

profiles.name: Isha Nair
profiles.bio: Design student who enjoys music, sketching, and collaborative environments. Looking for a friendly home near metro access.
profiles.lookingFor: Creative and respectful roommate, preferably okay with late-night project work during submissions.

profiles.name: Kabir Sood
profiles.bio: Software trainee working hybrid near Hitech City. Calm, organized, and usually at the gym after work.
profiles.lookingFor: Working professional or final-year student, non-smoker, prefers a quiet weekday routine.

profiles.name: Meera Joshi
profiles.bio: Economics student who likes tidy rooms, early classes, and homemade food. Friendly but values personal space.
profiles.lookingFor: Female student roommate preferred, vegetarian kitchen preferred, quiet study-friendly flat.

profiles.name: Arjun Rao
profiles.bio: Data analyst and gamer looking for a balanced flat. Works from office most days and keeps weekends relaxed.
profiles.lookingFor: Flatmate okay with gaming on weekends, no smoking indoors, and shared WiFi bills.

profiles.name: Sana Sheikh
profiles.bio: Media studies student doing part-time shoots. Social, responsible, and happiest in bright spaces with good ventilation.
profiles.lookingFor: Female or mixed flat is fine, friendly roommates, safe locality, and flexible guest rules.

profiles.name: Dev Patel
profiles.bio: Engineering student near Kothrud. Loves cricket, gym, and keeping a simple weekly routine.
profiles.lookingFor: Student flatmate preferred, budget-friendly rent, no loud parties during exam weeks.

profiles.name: Priya Menon
profiles.bio: Product designer working hybrid. Enjoys plants, podcasts, and peaceful evenings after work.
profiles.lookingFor: Working women preferred, clean common areas, balcony or natural light would be a bonus.

profiles.name: Nikhil Verma
profiles.bio: CA article assistant with long weekdays and quiet mornings. Reliable with rent, chores, and shared expenses.
profiles.lookingFor: Male roommate preferred, peaceful flat, good metro connectivity, clear house rules.

profiles.name: Tara Banerjee
profiles.bio: Architecture student who works on models late during submissions. Loves art, coffee, and tidy work corners.
profiles.lookingFor: Roommate who understands project deadlines, likes a creative home, and respects quiet hours.

profiles.name: Aditya Kulkarni
profiles.bio: Frontend developer working from a co-working space. Easy-going, into trekking, gaming, and weekend meal prep.
profiles.lookingFor: Responsible flatmate, good WiFi, okay with occasional cooking experiments and trekking plans.
